case_title: RIVAS,FLOR DE MARIA IDBA ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICES VS GAYLE, VERONICA: PRESIDENT/OWNER et al

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.725 CONTINUED FROM APR-28-1994 TO MAY-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.725 OF JUN-15-1994, DENIED
POS ON CIVIL SUBPENA TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL 200 INC.
MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.725 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS,FLOR DE MARIA IDBA ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICES HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
IT APPEARING THAT THE MOTION PURSANT TO CCP. 116. 725 HEARD ON APRIL 28, 1994 WAS NOT HEARD BEFORE THE JUDGE WHO GRANTED THE INTIAL JUDGMENT OF
FEBRUARY 23, 1994 AS REQUIRED. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT THE EFFECT OF THE RULING ON 4/28/94 IS DECLARED NULL & VOID.
MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.725 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS,FLOR DE MARIA IDBA ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICES HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
DEFENDANT GAYLE CALLED ASKING THAT THE 6/15/94 HEA RING BE BY CONFERENCE CALL TO HER MIAMI, FLA OFFIC E (305)670-0800, JUDGE MCBRIDE SO ADVISED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RIVAS,FLOR DE MARIA IDBA ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT GAYLE, VERONICA: PRESIDENT/OWNER TRAVEL 2000, INC., ET ALM EMPRESA DE TRANSPORTE AEREO DEL PERU, S.A., ET AL AERO PERU, ET AL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GAYLE, VERONICA: PRESIDENT/OWNER
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.725 OF MAY-27-1994, OFF CALENDAR
CASE ASSIGNED TO JUDGE MCBRIDE PER BOB CURL AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL 2000, INC., ET ALM

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVAS,FLOR DE MARIA IDBA ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAYLE, VERONICA: PRESIDENT/OWNER TRAVEL 2000, INC., ET ALM EMPRESA DE TRANSPORTE AEREO DEL PERU, S.A., ET AL AERO PERU, ET AL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM MONICA GAYLE, PRES TRAVEL 2000 REC'D SENT TO JUDGE DESMOND AND BOB CURL.
IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT THE HEARING OF MAY 27, 1994 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDA R.
POS ON SUBPENA TO DEFEND. AERO PERU ON FILE.
EXEMPT AS PER STAN,DATE AFTER 6/13 AT 8AM ONLY,ONL Y BEFORE JUDGE MCBRIDE AT DEPT.7.DATE FOR 6/15/94.
